Call ID: EXT-026
Type: external
Date: 2026-05-10
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Tomás (account manager); Aisha (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Tomás): Hi Aisha, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Aisha): My team keeps asking for a better mobile experience.
AM (Tomás): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Aisha): The team is generally positive, but there are gaps.
AM (Tomás): I'll flag the usability feedback; we're actively investing there.
Customer (Aisha): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Tomás): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
